kindreds.name: Kindreds of Middle-earth
kindreds.node.elf.eyes_of_the_eldar.name: Eyes of the Eldar
kindreds.node.elf.eyes_of_the_eldar.flav: The Eldar see further and truer than any other people under the stars.
kindreds.node.dwarf.aules_inheritance.fl: A Dwarf never truly loses his way in the deep places of the world.
kindreds.codex.title: Kindred Codex
kindreds.codex.guide.tree: Open your skill tree with [K], then spend discipline points earned through your deeds.
kindreds.codex.guide.earn: Earn points by living your people's life — fight, mine, sneak, craft, explore.
kindreds.codex.guide.skills: Passive skills are always on. Active skills fire with [G]. Vision toggles with [V], or equip it in the tree.
kindreds.codex.guide.gifts: The birth-gifts below are innate. Some wake with place and hour — starlight, the deep places, the open Sun.
kindreds.codex.choose: Choose this people in the Player's Book to walk their path and earn their skills.
kindreds.loadout.title: Ability Loadout
kindreds.loadout.hint.empty: Unlock active abilities in your skill tree to fill these slots.
kindreds.loadout.hint.cycle: Click a slot to cycle through your unlocked actives.
kindreds.loadout.hint.keys: In-world: cycle-slot key selects, use-ability key fires the selected slot.
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.0: Star-sight — the Eldar see through the dark of night
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.1: Foe of the Spiders — hews the brood of Ungoliant with deadly ease (+50% damage vs spiders)
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.2: Elven-swift — fleet and graceful of foot
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.3: Deft and quick — strikes faster than mortal eye can follow
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.4: Silent in the wild — moves unheard and unseen; foes notice the Firstborn late
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.5: Light-footed — the ground scarce bruises the Firstborn
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.6: Hard and resistant to hurt — hale of body (11 hearts)
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.7: Tall and far-reaching — strikes and works from a little farther (base Elf), and treads soft ground unhindered
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.8: Unwearied — needs no sleep and little food
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.9: Starlit Grace — heals (Regeneration) and quickens (+15% move speed, stacking) beneath the open night sky
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.10: Never sickens — immune to hunger's gnaw and to nausea; cold and powder-snow cannot freeze the Firstborn (base Elf + Kindred)
kindreds.trait.elf.plus.11: Unstained by the Shadow — curses and poisons wear off swiftly
kindreds.trait.elf.minus.0: Unease in the deep dark — creatures of light, the Firstborn are unsettled and weakened in lightless underground places (where a Dwarf is most at home)
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.0: Fire-hardy — Durin's folk burn far briefer than other peoples (the flame that felled dragons scarcely marks them)
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.1: Stone-hardy — endures wounds as no other kindred can (toughest of all peoples, ~13 hearts)
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.2: Unmovable as the roots of the mountains
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.3: Delver born — tears through stone with ease
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.4: Delver's Fortune — a practiced eye wins extra ore from the rock (25% chance of a double drop)
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.5: Deep-Delver — hastens and hardens in the deep places, out of the sky's sight
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.6: Unbowed by the Shadow — the most resistant of all peoples to curse and corruption; poisons and hexes fade swiftly
kindreds.trait.dwarf.plus.7: Hardy of body — endures hunger and toil far past other folk
kindreds.trait.hobbit.plus.0: Unheard and unseen — the Little Folk slip past notice like shadows
kindreds.trait.hobbit.plus.1: The uncommon good-luck of the Shire
kindreds.trait.hobbit.plus.2: Nimble — swift and quiet even while creeping
kindreds.trait.hobbit.plus.3: Resilient of heart — evil struggles to grip the Little Folk; curses and poisons wear off swiftly (the Ring itself found them hard to master)
kindreds.trait.hobbit.plus.4: Well-fed — while their belly is full, the Little Folk mend quietly (they thrive on good food and plain plenty)
kindreds.trait.hobbit.minus.0: Little folk — a slighter frame than the big folk (7 hearts)
kindreds.trait.hobbit.minus.1: No warrior's arm in open battle — strikes for less (−20%)
kindreds.trait.hobbit.minus.2: Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
kindreds.trait.human.plus.0: Vigour of the Edain — hardy and hale (12 hearts; base Men have no innate stats, so all of this is the Edain's own)
kindreds.trait.human.plus.1: Valour of Men — a stronger blow (+15% melee damage, and it stacks with Strength potions)
kindreds.trait.human.plus.2: Tall of Númenor — longer reach in the strike and at the work-bench
kindreds.trait.human.plus.3: Wayfarer — sure on any ground: unhindered by soul-sand, honey or mud, never slips on ice, and quick upon the road
kindreds.trait.human.plus.4: Ambition of the Secondborn — learns every craft the swifter
kindreds.trait.human.plus.5: Last Stand — below a third of health, desperate valour ERUPTS: DOUBLE melee damage (+100%, stacking), Strength, Resistance II, and Speed II until you climb back above a third
kindreds.trait.human.minus.0: The Doom of Men — no ancient gift shields you from fire, dark, or dread
kindreds.trait.human.minus.1: Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
kindreds.trait.orc.plus.0: Eyes bred for the black — Night Vision, always
kindreds.trait.orc.plus.1: Made for slaughter — a crueler, stronger blow (+25%)
kindreds.trait.orc.plus.2: Bloodlust — a fresh kill knits an Orc's wounds (heal on kill)
kindreds.trait.orc.plus.3: Soldier's hide — hardened for war (9 hearts)
kindreds.trait.orc.plus.4: Children of the Dark — by night and in the deep places, a heavier blow (+45% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
kindreds.trait.orc.plus.5: Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
kindreds.trait.orc.minus.0: Dread of the Sun — under open daylight strikes for less (−30%) and is slowed (Slowness I)
kindreds.trait.orc.minus.1: Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
kindreds.trait.goblin.plus.0: Cave-eyes that pierce the black — Night Vision, always
kindreds.trait.goblin.plus.1: Wall-crawler — scales sheer stone tirelessly, climbing far up any wall in one clamber (climbing far beyond any other kindred)
kindreds.trait.goblin.plus.2: Skulking and swift through the tunnels — nimble and quick afoot (base Goblin)
kindreds.trait.goblin.plus.3: Children of the Dark — by night and in the deep places, a heavier blow (+45% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
kindreds.trait.goblin.plus.4: Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
kindreds.trait.goblin.plus.5: Deft delver — quicker at hewing stone than most (base Goblin)
kindreds.trait.goblin.minus.0: Wretched and frail of body — only 7 hearts (base Goblin)
kindreds.trait.goblin.minus.1: Weak-armed — strikes for less even at rest (−10%, base Goblin)
kindreds.trait.goblin.minus.2: Dread of the Sun — under open daylight strikes for far less (a further −25%) and is slowed (Slowness I)
kindreds.trait.goblin.minus.3: Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
kindreds.trait.snaga.plus.1: Fleet-footed and lash-driven — quick afoot (base Snaga)
kindreds.trait.snaga.plus.2: Beneath notice — the overlooked slip past unseen
kindreds.trait.snaga.plus.3: Foul blades — crude weapons smeared with filth (30% chance to Poison the struck foe)
kindreds.trait.snaga.plus.4: Long-armed — reaches and places a little farther than most (base Snaga)
kindreds.trait.snaga.plus.5: Children of the Dark — by night and in the deep places, a heavier blow (+45% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
kindreds.trait.snaga.plus.6: Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
kindreds.trait.snaga.minus.0: Least and weakest of the Orc-kind — only 6 hearts, frailest of all the kindreds (base Snaga)
kindreds.trait.snaga.minus.1: Feeble arm — strikes for less even at rest (−20%, base Snaga)
kindreds.trait.snaga.minus.2: Dread of the Sun — under open daylight strikes for far less (a further −40%) and is badly slowed (Slowness II)
kindreds.trait.snaga.minus.3: Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.0: Fighting-Uruk — great of frame and stout (12 hearts)
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.1: Eyes bred for the dark — Night Vision, always
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.2: A crushing, brutal blow — strongest of the Orc-kind (+30%)
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.3: Bloodlust — feeds on slaughter, mending swiftly with each kill (heal on kill)
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.4: Braced and unyielding against the shove of battle (knockback resistance)
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.5: Fire-toughened — burns briefer than most folk (base Uruk)
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.6: Sun-defiant — where lesser Orcs cower, the fighting-Uruk grows bold in the open day (+45% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.7: Tireless — barely spends food from toil or wounds, and marches far past other folk before weariness sets in
kindreds.trait.uruk.plus.8: Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
kindreds.node.elf.archery.eyes_of_the_el: The keen sight of the Firstborn pierces mist and shadow alike.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.keen_draw.name: Keen Draw
kindreds.node.elf.archery.keen_draw.flav: Each arrow is drawn with a strength honed since the Elder Days.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.swift_nock.fla: An Elf nocks and looses ere a Man can raise his bow.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.piercing_shaft: One shaft skewers a whole file of the enemy.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.unerring_aim.f: Your shafts bend toward their mark, as if guided by Elbereth.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.keen_eyed_shot: A shot loosed by starlit sight strikes ever true and deep.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.unwearied_draw: The bow-arm of the Eldar knows no fatigue beneath the stars.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.galadhrim_voll: Loose as one — a fan of shafts darkens the sky.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.black_fletched: Shafts fledged in shadow-feather are bane to orc and troll alike.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.elven_tongue.name: Elven Tongue
kindreds.node.elf.lore.elven_tongue.flav: Words of the Eldar turn fortune gently in the speaker's favor.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.moon_letters.name: Moon Letters
kindreds.node.elf.lore.moon_letters.flav: Ithildin script, hidden by day, reveals its secrets to the far-seeing.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.ring_lore.name: Ring-Lore
kindreds.node.elf.lore.ring_lore.flavor: Knowledge of the Rings of Power grants steadiness against every blow.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.star_glass.name: Star-glass
kindreds.node.elf.lore.star_glass.flavor: A vial of Eärendil's light, to shine in dark places.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.ancient_grace.fla: Beneath open stars, the grace of ancient days settles like a shield.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.light_of_the_phia: Galadriel's gift blazes forth, a light in dark places when all other lights go out.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.shadow_ward.name: Shadow-Ward
kindreds.node.elf.lore.shadow_ward.flavo: Even in the deepest dark, the Eldar's spirit will not be quenched.
kindreds.node.elf.song.first_song.name: First Song
kindreds.node.elf.song.first_song.flavor: The first song sung beneath the stars still shelters those who hear it.
kindreds.node.elf.song.lay_of_leithian.f: The Release from Bondage — greatest of the songs of old, and its enchantment runs deep.
kindreds.node.elf.song.marching_song.fla: A rhythm older than roads quickens the hand upon the hilt.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_healing.f: A melody of mending drifts to every companion within its reach.
A voice fairer than any before or since stills pain and fear alike.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.light_step.fl: The Eldar walk upon snow and leaf and leave no mark behind.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.featherfall.f: Grace lends the body the lightness of a falling feather.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.fleet_of_foot: Tireless and swift, the Elves outrun the hunt itself.
Feet trained on the stairs of Rivendell find purchase where none seems to be.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.woodland_grac: Through wood and stream alike, the Elf moves as one born of both.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.paths_of_the_: The Wandering Companies know roads unseen, swiftest at twilight's edge.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.wood_friend: Beasts of root and branch sense no enemy in the Elf's quiet passing.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.spider_hunt: The webs of Mirkwood's brood are no match for a blade sworn against Ungoliant's kin.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.silent_trea: No twig snaps, no leaf stirs, beneath a step schooled in stealth.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.thranduils_: The Elvenking's huntsmen strike with venom drawn from the deep wood's craft.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.starlit_sta: Darkness hides no foe from one who was born beneath the stars.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.lord_of_bea: Every creature of wood and hill heeds the call of one who commands them all.
kindreds.node.elf.grand.arrow_of_the_eld: One shaft, drawn with the full might of the Firstborn, ends what it strikes.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.vein_sense.fl: The stone whispers where its riches lie hidden.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.deepening_for: Luck deepens with every stroke of the pick.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.tireless_pick: A Dwarf's arm does not tire at the rock-face.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.mithril_seeke: The true-silver of Khazad-dûm, worth more than a king's ransom.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.deep_delver_p: Deeper the halls go, and swifter still the delver's hand.
The mansions of Khazad-dûm made the Dwarves unassailable in the stone.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.undelved_deep: Strength wells up from halls no pick has ever touched.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.heart_of_the_: The Arkenstone's light — the mountain itself lends you its strength.
Gold calls to gold, as it did beneath Erebor of old.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.stout_arm.fla: A stout arm strikes true, forged in the deep-halls' fire.
Old hatred sharpens every blow against the orc-kind.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.shield_wall.f: Shoulder to shoulder, the Dwarves are a wall of iron.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.bane_of_troll: Even stone-trolls fear the axe that never tires.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.unmovable.fla: Not blast nor charge will shift a Dwarf set in his stance.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.heat_of_battl: Wounded but unbowed, his fury rises with his own blood.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.iron_stance.f: A Dwarf stands his ground where taller folk are swept away.
'Axes of the Dwarves! The Dwarves are upon you!'
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.ironbreaker.f: No blade forged breaks the ironbreaker's guard.
Born to the forge-light, tempered before the first breath.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.aule_hand.f: Aulë's own hand guides the hammer's fall.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.fireproof_p: Flame licks at skin long used to the forge's breath.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.erebor_craf: The craft of Erebor's smiths lives on in every plate.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.dwarven_mai: Ring upon ring, dwarven mail turns aside the world's malice.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.master_smit: Armour, endurance, and the forge itself answer to a true master of the craft.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.dragonslaye: Plate wrought to turn aside even a dragon's fiery breath.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.mithril_coa: 'Worth more than the Shire and all that is in it.' — mithril-mail turns near any blow.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.cirth_carv: Runes carved deep guide the hand beyond its reach.
The Long Runes hold fortune for those who read them true.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.rune_of_wa: A graven ward flares out and casts back the servants of the dark.
Only in moonlight does the hidden door reveal its runes.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.doors_of_d: Speak, friend, and enter - the doors guard the faithful.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.rune_of_mi: A rune graven on the axe-head bites the deeper.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.durins_war: Durin's ward shields the folk who bear his name.
kindreds.node.dwarf.grand.durins_wrath.f: The wrath of Durin the Deathless wakes, and the mountain trembles.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.unseen.name: Unseen
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.unseen.flav: Hobbits slip by unnoticed, small and quiet as a passing breeze.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.light_foote: Feet too light to leave a print, too quick to catch.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.nimble_fing: Quick fingers find coin, key, and luck alike.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.slip_away.f: A hobbit is there one moment, gone the next.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.quiet_as_a_: No creak of floorboard, no whisper of grass betrays him.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.dusk_walker: At the edge of light and dark, the Shire-folk vanish from sight.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.burglar.fla: Every good tale needs a burglar, and a bit of luck besides.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.ghost.name: Ghost
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.ghost.flavo: For a heartbeat's span, he is nothing but memory and moonlight.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.tough_litt: Small in stature, sturdier than travelers ever expect.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.second_bre: A well-fed hobbit weathers hardship better than most.
Bare feet find their footing where boots would stumble.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.well_provi: A hobbit never travels without something tucked away for hard times.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.stout_hear: Courage grown quietly in a homely heart holds firm under blows.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.shire_reso: The will to see the road home through, whatever the miles.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.stone_throw: A well-aimed stone from a hobbit's sling stings sharper than it looks.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.quick_hands: Hands trained on apples and conkers loose shot after shot.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.conker_shot: Every lad in the Shire knows a conker thrown true can fell a foe.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.true_aim.fl: A steady eye and a steadier hand rarely miss their mark.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.bullseye.fl: A perfect strike heartens the striker as much as it fells the foe.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.pony_fri: A kind word and a carrot win the trust of any beast of burden.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.bill_the: A sturdy pony's sure step keeps its rider steady on rough ground.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.gentle_h: Animals favor those who handle them with patience and care.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.green_th: A gift for growing things restores strength when the light grows soft.
kindreds.node.hobbit.song.walking_song.f: A merry tune on the road makes the miles pass lighter.
kindreds.node.hobbit.song.merry_heart.fl: A cheerful song shared among friends mends more than spirits.
The old traveler's tune still carries a bit of fortune's favor.
kindreds.node.hobbit.song.chorus_of_the_: Voices raised together in the Shire lend strength to every heart nearby.
kindreds.node.hobbit.grand.ringbearers_r: Even the smallest hands can carry the heaviest burden and endure.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.captains_: A captain's word steels the hearts of those who stand beside him.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.banner_of: Beneath the banners of the West, no shield-wall breaks.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.war_horn_: The horn of the Mark sounds, and Rohan answers.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.muster_of: The Free Peoples gather as one, swift to the muster.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.hands_of_: By this shall the rightful king be known — the sick are healed at his touch.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.warlord_o: A warlord of the West leads the charge that breaks the dark.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.standard_: The standard of Arnor rises, and hope rises with it.
kindreds.node.human.combat.swordsman_of_: Trained in the White City's ancient art of the blade.
kindreds.node.human.combat.shieldwall.fl: Shields lock, and the line of Gondor does not yield.
kindreds.node.human.combat.swift_blade.f: A blade that moves faster than the eye can follow.
kindreds.node.human.combat.sons_of_numen: The blood of Numenor still burns hot against the orc-kind.
kindreds.node.human.combat.desperate_val: At the last hour, Men fight hardest of all.
kindreds.node.human.combat.anduril_refor: The Sword that was Broken is Anduril, Flame of the West.
kindreds.node.human.combat.shieldmaidens: A shieldmaiden's courage burns brightest when all seems lost.
kindreds.node.human.archery.bowman_of_da: Taught the bow beneath the shadow of the Lonely Mountain.
kindreds.node.human.archery.keen_shaft.f: A keen shaft flies straight and swift to its mark.
kindreds.node.human.archery.long_sight_o: The bowmen of Dale see foes long before they arrive.
kindreds.node.human.archery.aim_of_the_b: The Bardings' aim is steady as the line of Bard himself.
kindreds.node.human.archery.black_arrow_: The black arrow that felled Smaug still hungers for great foes.
kindreds.node.human.archery.master_bowma: A master bowman of Esgaroth looses arrow after arrow unerring.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.smith_of_da: The forges of Dale ring with the shaping of sturdy mail.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.master_smit: A master smith's temper turns iron into unyielding steel.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.ward_forged: Mail forged with wards to turn aside the deadliest blows.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.reforged_st: Steel reforged bites deeper than steel first quenched.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.heirloom_of: An heirloom of the forge-kings, proof against ruin.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.horse_lor: Born to the saddle beneath the wide skies of Rohan.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.eored_rid: Riding as one Eored, swift and terrible as the wind.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.horse_mas: A horse-master's grace turns a fall into a landing.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.ride_of_t: 'Ride now, ride now! Ride to Gondor!' — the charge that broke the siege.
kindreds.node.human.song.song_of_the_mar: At dawn and dusk, the old songs of the Mark lend strength.
kindreds.node.human.song.war_cry_of_the_: Death! Death! The war-cry of the Rohirrim breaks the orc-host.
kindreds.node.human.song.battle_hymn_of_: A battle-hymn of the West quickens the step of every ally.
kindreds.node.human.song.song_of_the_ret: Song of the Return of the King
The song of the King's return heals wounds as it is sung.
kindreds.node.human.grand.kingship_of_th: Under the reunited crown, Gondor and Arnor stand as one.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.savage_blows.fl: Orcs hack and slash in a frenzy of quick, cruel strokes.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.first_blood.fla: The taste of a kill drives an orc to greater savagery.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.orc_brawn.name: Orc-brawn
kindreds.node.orc.combat.orc_brawn.flavo: An orc is weaker than an Uruk, but vicious beyond measure.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.war_numbers.fla: A lone orc is a coward; a hundred are a nightmare.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.iron_knuckles.f: Fists like iron shrug off any blow that dares land.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.cleaving_scimit: The notched scimitars of Mordor bite deep and dirty.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.brute_hide.name: Brute Hide
kindreds.node.orc.combat.brute_hide.flav: Scarred hide toughened by countless battles turns steel aside.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.reaver.name: Reaver
kindreds.node.orc.combat.reaver.flavor: A killer that feeds on the slaughter it makes.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.brute.name: Brute
kindreds.node.orc.combat.brute.flavor: A hulking wall of muscle that never yields ground.
Moves through shadow unseen, a hunter in the dark.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.cruel_blade.fla: A poisoned edge that lets no wound heal clean.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.dread_blade.fla: A blade that saps courage and strength with every cut.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.reaping_dark.fl: Darkness itself sharpens the reaper's hunger for prey.
Night unbinds an orc's true, ferocious power.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.black_breath.fl: The touch of the Enemy saps the strength and the will alike.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.thick_hide.fl: Leathery skin toughened against blade and claw.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.scavenger.fla: Feeds upon the fallen to keep the horde marching.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.foul_feeder.f: Nothing goes to waste in an orc's ravenous gut.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.war_scarred_h: Old wounds have hardened into an armor of scars.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.mordor_bred.f: Forged in the ash and fire of the Black Land.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.pit_endurance: Survivor of the breeding pits, hardened beyond death.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.warg_kin.fl: Bonded to the warg packs, swift as the hunt itself.
Orcs of the mountains ride wolves down from the heights.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.pack_caller: A howl that rallies fang and blade into one ravaging horde.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.gundabad_br: Bred in Gundabad's deep halls for speed and savagery.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.trampling_c: A warg charge that tramples all who stand in its path.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.warg_lord.f: Master of the warg riders, a terror upon the battlefield.
kindreds.node.orc.capstone.spawn_of_mord: A true child of the Dark Land, unstoppable amid the horde and the night.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.tunnel_born.f: Born in the black tunnels beneath the Misty Mountains, unseen from birth.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.ceiling_lurke: Clings upside-down in the dark, waiting to drop on the unwary.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.skitter.name: Skitter
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.skitter.flavo: Scuttles low and fast through cracks no larger foe could follow.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.towns_rafters: Scrambles the rickety rafters of Goblin-town like a second home.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.silent_paws.f: Not even echoing stone betrays a footfall this soft.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.ambush_from_s: Strikes from the black before the prey knows a goblin was near.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.wall_runner.f: Walls, ceilings, sheer cliffs — all one flat road to a true wall-runner.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.backstabber.f: A rusty blade between the ribs, and venom to finish the job.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.tunnel_rat.fl: Gnaws through stone and root alike, driven by an old hunger for depth.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.warren_digger: Riddles the rock with warrens only a goblin could call cozy.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.dark_delver.f: Sight sharpens and hands quicken the moment the sun is lost.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.gundabad_mine: Trained in the deep forges of Gundabad, where the pick never rests.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.black_pit_del: Even the lightless pits beneath the world yield to this relentless digging.
The mountain's veins spill extra ore for those who know its secret ways.
Raised in the gloom, it quickens the moment torchlight fails.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.deep_dark_st: The crushing black below the world lends its own terrible strength.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.cowardly_cun: A coward's instinct for slipping the killing blow, again and again.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.black_pit_dr: Wounds close swiftly in the dread black pits goblins call home.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.wretched_res: A wretched hide toughened by generations of Moria's cruelty.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.spider_kinsh: Kinship with the dark's eight-legged broods lends fearsome might.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.deep_king.fl: Rules the underdark like a squabbling king of the deep places.
Quick, vicious strikes, tooth and claw and rusted iron alike.
Strength swells with every snarling goblin crowding near.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.rusty_fangs.fla: A filthy, rust-caked blade festers any wound it opens.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.frenzied_pack.f: The pack's frenzy quickens every claw and blade in the swarm.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.envenomed_blade: Poison thick as tar coats a blade that never seems to miss.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.cornered_savage: Cornered and bleeding, a goblin turns twice as fast and thrice as savage.
kindreds.node.goblin.stealth.goblintown_: Goblin-town's full fury: swarming numbers, sheer walls, blows too quick to land.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.beneath_noti: Too wretched and small to catch a hunter's eye.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.cowards_spee: Fear puts a spring in even a snaga's shuffling step.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.dust_and_sha: It slips between shadows, quiet as dust settling.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.cutpurse.fla: A quick blade and quicker fingers, gone before you feel the cut.
Honor is for bigger orcs; a snaga strikes from behind.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.unseen.name: Unseen
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.unseen.flavo: No sentry's eye catches a snaga that does not wish to be caught.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.ghost_of_the: Vanishes into the dark like it was never dragged from the pits at all.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.knife_in_the: A poisoned blade for those who never see it coming.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.cringing_dark: It cowers in shadow, and the shadow makes it swift.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.lash_driven.f: Driven on by memory of the whip, it strikes harder in the dark.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.spite_of_the_: Every lash-scar feeds its hatred, though sunlight leaves it weak.
The hate bred into it at Lugbúrz swells strong once dark closes in.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.drivers_wrath: Fear of the lash drives a wounded snaga to a killing frenzy.
A warped, filthy bow — but it looses fast enough to matter.
No time to aim true when a bigger orc is watching.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.foul_darts.f: Barbs dipped in something rotten from the slave-pits.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.hunters_rang: It keeps its distance — closer means a beating, not a kill.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.mordor_venom: A poison brewed in Mordor's stinking vats, foul enough to fell a bigger orc.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.loosed_in_fl: A snaga looses on the run and still finds the mark.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.scrounger.f: It picks the dead clean; a snaga wastes nothing.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.desperate_f: Near death, it runs faster than it ever fought.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.wiry.name: Wiry
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.wiry.flavor: Starved and sinewy, it outpaces orcs twice its size.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.wretchs_end: Beaten and starved, it has learned to simply not die.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.scavengers_: Somehow the worst scraps still fall to its grasping hands.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.orc_draught: A vile brew that knits wounds shut when death is closest.
kindreds.node.snaga.capstone.slave_orcs_: Cornered, poisoned, and hateful — a snaga makes its dying bite count.
Saruman's vats bred you for one purpose: to fight, and to win.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.brutal_blows.f: Isengard steel swung without mercy, again and again.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.cleaving_strok: One swing, many foes — the Uruk-hai do not fight one at a time.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.crushing_blows: Blows so heavy they stagger and slow the foe.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.no_quarter.fla: Saruman's soldiers give no mercy, and expect none in return.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.bloodlust_unle: Every kill feeds the frenzy, and the frenzy feeds the flesh.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.blood_frenzy.f: In the killing-rage an Uruk knows neither pain nor fear.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.berserker_uruk: Surrounded by kin, the berserker's axe never slows.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.black_guard.fl: The Black Guard of Isengard stands unmoved, a wall of iron and hate.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.white_hand: The mark of Saruman steels the hearts of his servants.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.drill_mast: Isengard's drills forge raw strength into disciplined violence.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.isengard_d: Drilled in ranks, the war-band strikes as one iron fist.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.fear_of_th: The sight of the White Hand breaks the enemy's will before the blade does.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.orc_kin_ra: A rallying cry stiffens the orc-kin's arms and their resolve.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.warlord_of: A war-captain of Saruman, lord of a legion of Uruks.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.isengard_ste: Forged in Orthanc's furnaces, this steel turns aside axe and arrow.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.tempered_pla: Layer upon layer, the plate is tempered to shrug off ruin.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.black_iron.f: Black iron from the pits of Isengard, heavier than doom itself.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.war_smith_of: Orthanc's smiths labor day and night to arm Saruman's war-host.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.forge_of_ort: The great forge burns without cease beneath the tower of Orthanc.
No sun-fear was bred into you — Saruman's craft burned that weakness out.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.sun_marcher.fl: Where lesser orcs cower from daylight, the Uruk-hai march on.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.cruelty.name: Cruelty
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.cruelty.flavor: Cruelty is bred into the Uruk-hai as deep as their strength.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.unshaken.name: Unshaken
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.unshaken.flavo: Bleeding and battered, the Uruk-hai does not falter, does not flee.
All caution burned away, leaving only the wound and the rage.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.undying_hatred: Hatred for the West feeds a body that refuses to die.
kindreds.node.uruk.grand.fighting_uruk_h: "We are the fighting Uruk-hai!" — Isengard's finest, unbroken and unstoppable.
