kindreds.node.elf.archery.arrows_of_the_: Shafts fletched with the memory of Aman bite deep into the deathless dead.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.doom_of_gundab: The blade that follows the arrow is doom enough for any orc-host.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.bow_of_the_gal: Galadriel's gift, mastered: the deadliest bow in Middle-earth.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.earendils_watch.f: As the Silmaril wards the Mariner's brow, so starlight turns the killing blow aside.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.bane_of_the_barro: Old lore taught the Eldar the words that unmake the walking dead.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.light_everlasting: A light that does not fail, kindled long ago beyond the circles of the world.
kindreds.node.elf.song.echoes_of_valinor: A memory of the Blessed Realm quickens the feet of all who hear it sung.
kindreds.node.elf.song.dirge_of_mandos.f: A song of doom is sung, and the halls of waiting open for the foe who hears it.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_the_valar: A theme older than the world itself rises from the singer, and all who stand near are remade by it.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.starlit_wayfa: Under open stars the feet of the Firstborn scarcely touch the ground.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.endurance_of_: The Eldar do not tire nor break as the short-lived races do.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.paths_beyond_: One who has glimpsed the straight road walks every other path more lightly.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.warden_of_t: No web is spun in a greenwood the Warden has sworn to keep.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.scourge_of_: The orc-kind learned long ago to fear the wardens of the trees.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.master_of_t: The forest itself lends its strength to the one who has mastered its secret paths.
kindreds.node.elf.grand.star_of_earendil: High above Middle-earth burns the hope of the Eldar, and it does not go out while one of the Firstborn stands.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.gem_cutter.fl: The Dwarves cut gems as no other folk can, and fortune favours them.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.durins_folk.f: The line of Durin does not fail while the mountain still stands.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.dragon_sickne: The hoard sings sweetly, and a dwarf who listens too long grows blind to all but gold.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.khazad_dum_re: For a time, the glory of Dwarrowdelf is yours to command.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.master_of_the: Fortune, seam, and stone all answer to the lord of the mountain-halls.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.grudge_bearer: The Book of Grudges is long, and every stroke repays a debt in full.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.stonehelm_gua: The guard of the Dwarf-kings turns steel and hurls it back.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.durins_bane_s: What woke in the deep once claimed a king - this dwarf has sworn it shall not claim another.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.unbreakable_l: No charge, no siege, no despair has yet broken the line of Khazad-dûm.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.runic_tempe: Cirth graven deep into the steel turn its edge back upon its foes.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.mithril_wea: Woven finer than any mail of Men, light as a feather and hard as dragon-scale.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.helm_of_ere: Beneath the Lonely Mountain's helm, even a mortal wound is turned aside.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.durins_mith: True mithril of Durin's line, worth more than the whole of the Shire and all it contains.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.runes_of_p: Angerthas cut with a steady hand hold their strength long after the blade has struck.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.warding_si: Under open stars, the old sigils remember how to mend as well as to guard.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.ward_everl: Wards that do not fade while the stone endures.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.rune_of_th: The oldest runes of the Dwarrowdelf still guard the deep places, and those who walk them.
kindreds.node.dwarf.grand.aule_legacy.fl: Rune and hammer joined as one - the whole inheritance of Aulë's children, brought to bear.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.fair_folk_l: Some say the Shire-folk keep a little fairy blessing tucked behind their ears.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.prince_of_b: Bilbo Baggins made the title respectable; this hobbit means to make it legendary.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.shadow_of_b: In the Prancing Pony's corners and Bree's back lanes, a hobbit learns to be no one at all.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.master_thie: There has not been such a hobbit for a burglar's trade since the tales of Bag End.
kindreds.node.hobbit.stealth.unseen_lege: Songs will be sung of a hobbit no eye could hold, not even in the direst hour.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.iron_pot_b: A well-fed hobbit is a hard hobbit to keep down, and harder still to keep hurt.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.fleet_of_f: Better a quick step out of harm's way than a shield never raised in time.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.hobbit_hol: Raised warm and well in a snug smial, a hobbit shrugs off what would fell a Man.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.long_road_: There and back again, over root and stone, and never once truly caught.
kindreds.node.hobbit.survival.there_and_: The tale every hobbit hopes to live, and every hobbit hopes to finish.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.deadeye_sho: A stone flung true from a hobbit's sling has ended fights twice its size.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.quickfire_s: One stone follows another before the first has struck home.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.bandobras_c: Bandobras 'Bullroarer' Took rode down a whole goblin line at the Battle of Greenfields.
kindreds.node.hobbit.archery.thain_of_th: The Shire remembers the hobbit bold enough to be named its champion.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.farmer_m: Grip, Fang, and Wolf know every hedge and hollow of the Marish, and share what they know.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.smials_m: A burrow full of creatures great and small stands watch over its own.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.wild_fre: The beasts beyond the Shire's hedges favor those who walk among them without fear.
kindreds.node.hobbit.beast_lore.old_took: The Old Took kept stranger company than most, and his kin still have the knack for it.
kindreds.node.hobbit.song.green_hill_cou: Roads go ever on and on, but a Shire song makes the going sweet.
kindreds.node.hobbit.song.rousing_chorus: Sung loud enough, a marching song stiffens the backbone of every friend in earshot.
kindreds.node.hobbit.song.song_of_the_fe: Nine voices or one, the old songs bind companions tighter than any rope.
kindreds.node.hobbit.grand.bullroarer_to: He knocked the goblin king's head clean off with a club, and it rolled down a rabbit hole - some say that is how the game of golf began.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.knight_of: Under the silver swan banner, the Prince's knights hold the line when all others break.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.captain_o: The Rangers of the North answer to a captain of Elendil's line, and his word steadies every blade around him.
kindreds.node.human.combat.blade_of_the_: Trained to break a shield-line with a single sweeping stroke, and to hold their own after.
kindreds.node.human.combat.blood_of_nume: In the veins of the Dúnedain still runs the strength of the Downfallen isle, undimmed by the years of Middle-earth.
kindreds.node.human.combat.last_stand_of: When the shield-wall fails and the banners fall, the captains of Men are the last to yield ground.
kindreds.node.human.archery.captain_of_t: The marshal of the archer-companies, deadly against the horde.
kindreds.node.human.archery.heir_of_bard: The bow that felled Smaug passed to a lineage that forgets no foe, dragon or otherwise.
kindreds.node.human.archery.wind_lord_of: Arrows leave the string faster than the eye can follow, each one finding new strength in the last foe's fall.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.forge_of_th: Forge of the Kings of Dale
Under Bard's line the forges of Dale rang anew, tempering mail fit for a king's own guard.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.mail_of_the: Armor forged in the White City's deep smithies turns aside blows that would fell lesser steel.
kindreds.node.human.smithing.blade_of_th: Blade of the Kings of Dale
A sword tempered by the forge-kings' own hand cuts wide and deep, sweeping foe from foe.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.riders_of: An éored rides as one body, and the swiftness of the foremost horse becomes the swiftness of all.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.charge_of: Spears level, horns cry, and the horse-lords of Rohan break upon the foe like a wave upon stone.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.king_of_t: A lord of Rohan does not tire while his people stand, and every fallen foe feeds his strength anew.
kindreds.node.human.song.lay_of_the_last: The old song of Elendil and Gil-galad still stiffens the resolve of those who stand together against the Shadow.
kindreds.node.human.song.song_of_the_whi: As the Tree of Gondor bloomed again at the King's return, so this song renews strength that should have failed.
kindreds.node.human.grand.return_of_the_: The Sceptre of Annúminas is raised once more, and Gondor and Arnor are one kingdom under one lord.
kindreds.node.human.grand.ranger_of_the_: Bow across the back and blade at the hip, a Ranger of the Dúnedain hunts orc-kin from the Shire to the Misty Mountains unseen and unthanked.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.gorgoroth_drill: Whipped into formation on the ash-flats below Barad-dûr, an orc learns to strike harder than the lash that taught him.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.gorgoroth_rampa: The horde of the black land runs riot, and feeds as it kills.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.unbreakable.fla: The Brute plants his feet like a tower of Gorgoroth stone: nothing living moves him from where he stands.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.rampage_undying: Every wound dealt feeds the slaughter; the Reaver rises from each kill hungrier and harder to end.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.iron_bulwark.fl: Scarred plate and thickened orc-hide together make the Brute a wall no blade nor axe can breach.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.shadow_step.fla: A lifetime dodging overseers' clubs teaches an orc to slip a killing blow as easily as a beating.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.venom_kiss.name: Venom Kiss
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.venom_kiss.flav: Blades steeped in the black filth of Gorgoroth's pits leave wounds that fester long after the fight is done.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.grishnakh_terro: As the captains of Mordor taught, an orc that fights in darkness need not out-hit its foe - only outlast the fear it deals.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.moria_dark.name: Dark of Moria
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.moria_dark.flav: In the deep-dark beneath the mountains, far from any sun, an orc's strength is unbound and merciless.
In the deepest black, an orc's rage swells until even hardened warriors falter at the sight of him.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.hardened_scar: A hide crossed with a hundred old wounds no longer flinches from the shock of a blow.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.carrion_gorge: Nothing is wasted in Mordor's ranks - an orc gorges on the fallen and marches on stronger for it.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.gorgoroth_end: Bred on the ash-plains where nothing soft survives, this orc's body has hardened into something built to endure.
An orc eats anything — carrion, filth, or worse — and thrives.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.blood_scent: The pack scents blood and drives the prey to you.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.gundabad_al: The warg-packs bred beneath Gundabad answer to one who has proven himself their equal in savagery.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.warg_charge: Riding down fleeing prey at a warg's shoulder, an orc learns to hit like a landslide and stand like a rock.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.moria_wolf_: The wolves that besieged the Fellowship at Hollin answer your call.
kindreds.node.orc.capstone.horde_of_gorg: The endless host bred in Mordor's pits and loosed beneath Sauron's banner - Children of the Dark who do not tire, do not scatter, and do not stop coming.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.pick_that_bit: A rusty pick meant for stone finds a throat just as easily.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.rich_seam.fla: A goblin's nose for ore never fails, not in the deepest dark of Moria.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.moria_gold_ve: Khazad-dum's old veins still run rich for those low and greedy enough to find them.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.ore_hoarder.f: Every glint of metal goes into the hoard; none of it is ever shared.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.black_chasm_d: Bores through rubble and rock alike, chasing the black chasm ever downward.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.great_goblin_: The Great Goblin's warren-swarm digs, hoards, and overwhelms all at once.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.gundabad_trea: Gundabad's vaults are stuffed with plunder no goblin will ever willingly part with.
kindreds.node.goblin.delve.black_pit_dri: Drowned tunnels and flooded pits are no obstacle to a driller bred for the black pits.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.night_terror: The spiders' broodkin taught it well: fear is a weapon sharper than any blade.
kindreds.node.goblin.shadow.gundabad_glo: Gundabad's gloom wraps close, turning killing blows into glancing ones.
A squabbling king of the underdark endures what would kill a lesser thing.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.horde_master.fl: Every goblin at its back makes it bolder, faster, and far more dangerous.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.gundabad_warcry: A shriek from Gundabad's gates sends blades flashing twice as fast.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.venom_master.fl: Its blade is never merely rusty; the rot on the edge is bred with care.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.moria_horde_kin: Crowned by the swarm at its heels, it strikes with the weight of Moria itself.
kindreds.node.goblin.war.black_venom.fla: A venom so black it heals the striker as surely as it kills the struck.
There is no wall in Khazad-dum too sheer, no shaft too deep to scale.
Not even the stone remembers where it passed.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.throat_cutter: One cut, one gasp, and it is already gone into the dark.
kindreds.node.goblin.skulk.gundabad_nigh: Every foe who has faced it and lived still wakes screaming of Gundabad's dark.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.rag_cloak.fl: Stitched from stolen scraps, it breaks the eye's hold on a scurrying shape.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.midden_lurke: It squats in the refuse-heaps of the camp, feeding on what bigger orcs discard.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.shadow_of_lu: Trained in the black pits beneath the Tower, it has learned to be less than a shadow.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.gutting_the_: One cut, one gasp, and the sentry never raises the alarm.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.flinching_mal: Cornered and bleeding, it bites hardest just before it would break.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.foul_reek.fla: The stench off its blade alone is enough to sicken a stronger foe.
In true dark it forgets its own weakness, and something crueler wakes.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.despair_monge: It works to break spirits as readily as bodies, spreading dread ahead of the blade.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.black_breath_: A faint taste of the Nazgûl's chill clings to it when the dark is deepest.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.parting_shot: Loose the arrow, then run — a snaga's whole strategy in one motion.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.eye_for_weak: It has watched enough beatings to know exactly where a blow lands hardest.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.black_venom_: Barbs steeped twice in Mordor's foulest brews, meant to fell more than sting.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.lugburz_mark: Drilled under the lash until the bow moves faster than thought.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.viper_quiver: Every shaft in it carries enough poison to drop an Uruk twice its size.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.carrion_gor: It gorges on the fallen the instant the fighting stops, mending itself on scraps.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.rat_of_the_: No warren, drain, or crack in Mordor's stone is too narrow for its escape.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.gutter_glut: It has eaten worse than most would believe, and grown tougher for it.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.deep_burrow: It knows every pit-shaft and sinkhole between here and Cirith Ungol, and lands soft in all of them.
kindreds.node.snaga.survival.never_say_d: Half-dead and still snarling, it claws back from wounds that should have finished it.
kindreds.node.snaga.capstone.desperate_a: Arrow, then blade, then flight — it strikes from hiding and is gone before the corpse falls.
kindreds.node.snaga.capstone.the_last_sn: Whipped, starved, and forgotten by Lugbúrz, it is still standing when the bigger orcs are not.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.onslaught.name: Onslaught
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.onslaught.flav: No pause between blows — only the next, and the next, until the enemy falls.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.hardened_by_ba: Scar by scar, wound by wound, the flesh Saruman forged grows only tougher.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.death_march.fl: They ran Rohan end to end under the open sun, and did not stop.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.iron_bulwark.f: Behind plate and hate, the Black Guard becomes a wall nothing breaks.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.reaver_of_isen: Kill after kill, the reaver's blade never dulls, never tires, never stops.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.shield_of_orth: Cast in the tower's own likeness — black, sheer, and unyielding.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.forced_mar: Saruman's brand drives you on beneath the open sun, tireless as the host at your back.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.iron_disci: Isengard's drills leave no room for hesitation — only the strike, delivered as one.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.marshal_of: A marshal's warcry draws the war-band tight, blades rising together.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.master_of_: Fear marches ahead of you like a banner, breaking the enemy before the charge lands.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.drillmaste: Trained in the black pits of Lugbúrz, your command steels the orc-kin's arms.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.whispers_o: The Voice compels; none under it dare falter.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.black_iron_p: Plate hammered from the black iron of Isengard's pits, heavy enough to turn aside ruin.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.black_plate_: Head to heel in black plate, the Uruk becomes a moving wall of Isengard steel.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.hardened_by_: Tempered again and again in Orthanc's furnace, until flame itself finds little purchase.
Forged for the breach at Helm's Deep — plate built to walk through fire and falling stone.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.molten_tempe: Quenched straight from the forge, the steel holds an edge no blow can shatter.
Where lesser orcs would cower and burn, the noonday sun only feeds your fury.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.black_speech_c: A word of the Black Speech on the blade, and the wound festers beyond healing.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.unbreakable_wi: Sun overhead, steel in hand — nothing shoves the Uruk-hai from its feet.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.dread_of_iseng: Your name alone unmans the enemy's line before the first blow falls.
kindreds.node.uruk.grand.terror_of_the_w: Blood and fear together — the mark of the White Hand made flesh in war.
kindreds.perk.long_shot: Long-shot: +%d%% damage per block of range (max +%d%%)
kindreds.perk.arrow_crit: Marksman: your arrows always strike critically
kindreds.perk.arrow_pierce: Piercing shaft: arrows pass through %d foes
kindreds.perk.multishot: Storm of arrows: loose +%d extra arrows
kindreds.perk.arrow_effect: Fletcher's craft: your arrows afflict the struck foe
kindreds.perk.swift_draw: Swift-draw: draw the bow far faster
kindreds.node.elf.archery.woodelf_aim.fl: The first lesson of the Greenwood: let the arrow fly true.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.eye_of_the_eld: The Firstborn see farther and truer than any mortal eye.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.marksmans_pois: A drawn breath, a still hand — every arrow bites deep.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.star_sighted.f: By starlight you count the riders on a distant hill.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.deadeye_of_mir: The farther the foe, the surer his doom.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.blur_of_arrows: Hand and string become a blur; the quiver empties like rain.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.storm_of_the_g: Each shot becomes many; a storm of arrows from Lórien's bows.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.great_bow.name: The Great Bow
kindreds.node.elf.archery.great_bow.flav: Mallorn and elf-hair: a bow that drives shafts through shields.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.venom_arrows.f: War-arrows of the Wood-elves, tipped with a creeping poison.
Cruel barbs that sap a foe's strength and will not be drawn out.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.bane_of_the_yr: The old hatred: no Elf-arrow loves an orc.
kindreds.node.elf.archery.arrow_of_the_e: One perfect shot — as Legolas felled the fell-beast from the night.
kindreds.perk.camouflage: Cloak of Lórien: you vanish while sneaking
kindreds.node.elf.survival.wood_wise.fla: The Wood-elves move quiet and quick through their green halls.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.light_of_foot: Legolas ran light upon the snow where others floundered.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.silvan_shadow: A stealth even the Sindar could not master — you strike from the unseen.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.unseen_hunter: Foes pass within a spear's length and never know you are there.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.cloak_of_lori: Galadriel's grey cloak hides the wearer, warm or cool as need be.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.ghost_of_the_: None see you come, and none see you go.
Neither snow nor water nor soft ground stays the feet of the Firstborn.
Up the sheer trunks of the golden wood, sure as a squirrel.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.swift_as_nimr: Like the maiden's stream, you flow past every obstacle.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.waybread.name: Waybread of the Elves
kindreds.node.elf.survival.waybread.flav: One bite of lembas sustains a day's long march.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.enduring_grac: The Firstborn bend but do not break beneath the blows of the world.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.grace_of_the_: Wounds that would fell a Man knit swiftly on the deathless.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.deathless_vig: Age and hurt have little hold on the immortal Firstborn.
kindreds.node.elf.survival.warden_of_the: The Silvan sentinel: unseen, unwearied, master of the deep wood.
kindreds.perk.foresight: Foresight: you foresee blows and turn them (−%d%% damage taken)
kindreds.node.elf.lore.lore_of_the_eldar: The Firstborn forget nothing of the long years.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.sight_beyond_sigh: The Eldar perceive what is hidden, and what is yet to come.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.premonition.name: Premonition
kindreds.node.elf.lore.premonition.flavo: A shadow of the future warns you from harm's path.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.elven_reflexes.fl: You move before the blow is even struck.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.doom_averted.name: Doom Averted
kindreds.node.elf.lore.doom_averted.flav: Foresight turns aside the killing stroke.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.wisdom_of_ages.fl: Nothing takes the ancient of days unawares.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.light_of_earendil: The Silmaril's light is death to the creatures of the dark.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.phial_of_galadrie: A light to you in dark places, when all other lights go out.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.star_of_earendil_: The morning and evening star, hallowed light against all shadow.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.elf_friend.name: Elf-friend
kindreds.node.elf.lore.elf_friend.flavor: Good fortune follows those the Eldar favour.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.unstained_by_shad: Sauron's dread finds no hold on the hearts of the Firstborn.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.keeper_of_lore.fl: The memory of the Elder Days is a strength all its own.
Those who saw the Two Trees carry their light forever.
kindreds.node.elf.lore.wisdom_of_the_fir: Foresight, light, and the fortune of ages, in one who has seen all.
kindreds.node.elf.song.voice_of_the_elda: The Elves sing as they walk, and the hearts of their companions are lifted.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_rest.name: Song of Rest
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_rest.flav: A quiet lay that mends the weary — as in the House of Elrond.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_valour.fl: War-songs of the Eldar put fire in an ally's heart.
kindreds.node.elf.song.march_of_the_host: A marching-lay that quickens every step, yours and your fellows'.
kindreds.node.elf.song.hymn_of_courage.f: None who hear it flinch from the foe.
'Gil-galad was an Elven-king...' — the last host of the Eldar takes heart.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_binding.f: Lúthien's enchantment: foes are bound in slumberous weakness.
Your voice alone unnerves the servants of the Enemy.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_that_cast_do: Song that Cast Down the Tower
As Lúthien sang, the walls of Sauron's isle fell — and the dead of the dark cannot bear it.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_mending.f: A healing lay that closes wounds even as it is sung.
kindreds.node.elf.song.grace_of_rivendel: In the Last Homely House, hurt and weariness fall away.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_the_undyi: The deathless sing, and death loses its grip.
kindreds.node.elf.song.music_of_the_ainu: An echo of the Great Music that made the world — healing beyond mortal art.
kindreds.node.elf.song.song_of_luthien_t: The song that even Morgoth could not resist — command and mercy in one voice.
kindreds.perk.beast_calm: Friend of Beasts: wild animals will not attack you
kindreds.perk.pack_bond: Pack-bond: your tamed beasts fight with Strength %d (and, at the deeper bond, hardier and self-mending)
kindreds.perk.elven_steed: Elven-steed: your mount runs swift and leaps far (Speed %d), and at the deeper art tireless
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.friend_of_b: The Elves have long friendship with the beasts of the wild.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.speech_of_b: You call, and the wild answers — a pack of wolves runs to your side.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.pack_bond.f: Beasts that follow you fight the fiercer for the bond.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.summon_the_: A greater pack answers your call.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.alpha_of_th: You lead, and your beasts are hardier and stronger for it.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.lord_of_wol: The wolves of the wild own you their lord.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.call_of_hua: The great hound of the Valar answers — mighty, hallowed, and true.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.hunters_bon: Each foe that falls to the hunt mends you a little.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.the_great_h: You and your fellows run swift on the hunt, and are mended by the kill.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.hound_of_th: Huan comes oftener, and your beasts fight with a fury.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.elven_steed: You ride as the Elves do — bareback, swift, and sure.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.tireless_mo: Your steed runs on where a mortal horse would founder.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.sure_seat.f: You sit the saddle unshaken through any peril.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.asfaloth.fl: Glorfindel's steed bore the wounded away faster than the wind.
kindreds.node.elf.beast_lore.friend_of_a: The wild is at peace with you, and answers your every call.
kindreds.perk.vein_miner: Vein-miner: breaking an ore breaks the whole connected vein (up to %d blocks)
kindreds.perk.miners_rhythm: Miner's Rhythm: striking ore grants a short Haste %d
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.stoneworked.f: Aulë taught the Dwarves the working of stone before all else.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.deep_delver.f: In the deep places under the mountains, a Dwarf comes into his strength.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.delvers_fortu: A practised eye pries more from every seam.
You strike the richest seams, where the ore runs thick.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.vein_miner.fl: Where a Dwarf strikes one ore, he takes the whole seam.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.miners_rhythm: The hammer finds its rhythm, and the work flies.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.khazad_tunnel: The Dwarves delved halls and roads through the roots of the world.
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.caveborn.name: Cave-born
kindreds.node.dwarf.mining.caveborn.flav: A Dwarf's eyes need no torch in the dark of the deep.
kindreds.perk.mend_gear: Master-craft: your worn and held gear slowly repairs itself
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.smiths_hand: The Dwarves were the greatest smiths of Middle-earth.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.master_craf: Gear wrought by a Dwarf is made so well it mends its own hurts.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.plated.name: Plated
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.plated.flav: Dwarf-plate turns blades that would cleave lesser mail.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.tempered_pl: Steel folded and quenched in the deep forges.
Rings of Dwarf-steel, light and near unbreakable.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.careful_wor: A Dwarf does not hurry the forge, and the work endures.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.forge_maste: At a word you make your gear whole again, as at the anvil.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.everlasting: Your works do not wear — they mend as fast as they are marred.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.work_of_the: The eldest Dwarf-house wrought things to outlast the mountains.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.forge_harde: One who works the forge fears no flame.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.anvil_stanc: A Dwarf plants his feet like an anvil and will not be moved.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.aule_blesse: The Smith of the Valar, maker of the Dwarves, guards his children.
kindreds.node.dwarf.smithing.forgefather: In the making-fire you are unbowed, and it lends you its strength.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.axe_of_the_dw: The Dwarves are masters of the axe and the war-hammer.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.hewer.name: Hewer
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.hewer.flavor: Every blow of a Dwarf's axe bites deep.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.orc_cleaver.f: The Dwarves' hatred of the orc-kind is old and cold.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.troll_hewer.f: Even the hide of a cave-troll splits before a Dwarf-axe.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.stone_skin.fl: Strike a Dwarf and the blow rebounds on you.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.dwarven_tempe: A wounded Dwarf grows only more dangerous.
Near death, a Dwarf's blood runs hot and hard.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.last_stand_of: At the last, the Dwarves sell their lives most dearly.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.fury_of_khaza: As Gimli at the Deep — a cornered Dwarf is a storm of axe-work.
kindreds.node.dwarf.combat.bane_of_the_o: Hatred, iron, and unbroken will — the doom of the orc-kind.
The Dwarves graved runes of power in stone and steel.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.ward_of_st: Runes carved deep make the bearer hard as the mountain-root.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.rune_of_en: A rune of long-life and stubborn strength.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.gate_of_du: 'Speak, friend, and enter.' — the West-gate's runes hold against all evil.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.graven_wea: Runes on the blade mark the struck foe with a tell-tale glow.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.rune_of_wr: The rune blazes, and battle-fury fills your limbs.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.rune_of_th: The war-runes of the Dwarf-lords of old.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.durins_lor: The deep wisdom of the line of Durin the Deathless.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.runes_of_m: The graven halls of Khazad-dûm ward those who read them.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.heart_rune: A rune blessed by Aulë, the maker of the Dwarves.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.power_of_k: The full might of the greatest realm the Dwarves ever built.
kindreds.node.dwarf.runecraft.master_of_: Ward, might, and the deep lore of Durin, graven into one.
kindreds.perk.auto_smelt: Forge-delver: ore you mine comes up already smelted
kindreds.perk.ore_magnet: Ore-magnet: mined drops fly straight into your pack
kindreds.perk.prospector_xp: Prospector's bounty: mining ore grants +%d bonus experience
kindreds.node.human.combat.swordsman.fla: Men are the swordsmen of Middle-earth, quick to learn the blade.
kindreds.node.human.combat.valour_of_men: The courage of Men is a wonder even to the Wise.
kindreds.node.human.combat.bladework.fla: Long drill at arms makes every stroke sure.
A trained hand strikes swift and often.
kindreds.node.human.combat.master_at_arm: The weapon-master of a great hall, feared in the lists.
kindreds.node.human.combat.blademaster_o: The finest swordsmen of the White City.
kindreds.node.human.combat.defiance.name: Defiance
kindreds.node.human.combat.defiance.flav: The Gift of Men: to defy fate itself when hope is gone.
kindreds.node.human.combat.second_wind.f: A wounded Man finds strength he did not know he had.
kindreds.node.human.combat.last_hope_of_: Cornered and near death, a Man becomes terrible to behold.
kindreds.node.human.combat.soldier_of_go: Shield and mail of the Tower Guard.
kindreds.node.human.combat.foe_of_the_sh: Men have warred against the servants of the Enemy since the First Age.
kindreds.node.human.combat.flame_of_the_: Andúril, reforged from the shards of Narsil, blazes in your hand.
kindreds.node.human.combat.heir_of_isild: The blade that cut the Ring from Sauron's hand answers its true lord.
kindreds.node.human.combat.champion_of_m: Blade, valour, and the Flame of the West in one unbroken will.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.captain.f: Men follow a bold captain into any peril.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.presence_: There is a kingliness in some Men that steadies all around them.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.banner_be: A raised standard quickens the march of a host.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.rally.fla: At your word, faltering men take heart and stand.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.white_tre: The standard of Gondor: none who march beneath it are easily broken.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.standard_: The black banner with the White Tree, seven stars and crown.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.healing_h: 'The hands of the king are the hands of a healer.'
kindreds.node.human.leadership.athelas.f: Kingsfoil, worthless in the hands of the ignorant, precious in the King's.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.the_heale: Aragorn came as a healer to the Houses of Healing, and Gondor knew its king.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.war_leade: A great captain turns a rout into a stand.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.morale.fl: Victory feeds on itself; each foe felled heartens the host.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.horn_of_h: When that horn sounded in the Deep, the orcs quailed.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.dread_of_: The Enemy's servants feel an old fear before the Men of the West.
kindreds.node.human.leadership.lord_of_t: Rally, healing, and kingly presence — the host is unbreakable at your side.
kindreds.node.human.archery.bowman.name: Bowman
kindreds.node.human.archery.bowman.flavo: The archers of Gondor and Rohan are trained from boyhood.
kindreds.node.human.archery.steady_aim.f: A soldier's discipline steadies the drawing hand.
A sharp eye finds the gap in the foe's guard.
kindreds.node.human.archery.far_shot.fla: The longbowmen loose at ranges that seem impossible.
kindreds.node.human.archery.piercing_sho: A heavy war-arrow drives through shield and man behind.
kindreds.node.human.archery.deadshot.fla: The marksman who never misses the mark.
kindreds.node.human.archery.quick_nock.f: A drilled archer nocks and looses in a breath.
kindreds.node.human.archery.hail_of_arro: A volley darkens the sky over the ranks of Gondor.
kindreds.node.human.archery.massed_volle: Ranks of bowmen loose as one, and the arrows fall like rain.
kindreds.node.human.archery.rain_of_gond: The disciplined volleys that held the walls of Minas Tirith.
kindreds.node.human.archery.soldier_bowm: The war-archer knows the orc for his oldest foe.
kindreds.node.human.archery.orc_fletcher: War-arrows fletched to sap the strength of the orc-kind.
kindreds.node.human.archery.warden_of_th: From the battlements, his arrows skewer a whole file of orcs.
kindreds.node.human.archery.bowmaster_of: Range, volley, and the orc-bane in one master of the bow.
kindreds.perk.war_steed: War-steed: your mount runs swift and leaps far (Speed %d), and tireless at the deeper art
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.horse_lor: The Rohirrim are the finest horsemen in all Middle-earth.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.rider_of_: A Rider of Rohan is one with his horse from childhood.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.groom.fla: Well-tended, a war-horse runs longer and truer.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.barded_ho: Horse-armour of the Mark turns many a blow.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.tireless_: The horses of Rohan run on where others would fall.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.mearas.fl: Shadowfax and his kin, princes of horses, who understand the speech of Men.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.cavalryma: A charging rider is worth ten men on foot.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.lancer.fl: A couched lance shatters the orc-line at the gallop.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.the_charg: When the Riders charge, the earth shakes and foes are scattered.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.hardy_rid: The mailed Riders of the Mark are hard to unhorse.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.horse_fri: The folk of Rohan are friends to all good beasts.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.eored_cap: A captain of a company of Riders leads the charge.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.marshal_o: The Marshals command the muster of Rohan.
kindreds.node.human.beast_lore.lord_of_t: Steed, charge, and the muster of Rohan answer to the King of the Mark.
kindreds.node.human.survival.ranger.name: Ranger
kindreds.node.human.survival.ranger.flav: The Rangers of the North walk the wild, guarding lands that do not know them.
kindreds.node.human.survival.wilderness_: A Ranger reads the land and the sky as others read a book.
kindreds.node.human.survival.woodcraft.f: Strider could pass through the wild and leave no trace.
No ground is too rough for a Ranger's tireless stride.
kindreds.node.human.survival.strider.fla: 'All that is gold does not glitter, not all those who wander are lost.'
kindreds.node.human.survival.grey_ranger: The Grey Company came unlooked-for, and vanished as quietly.
kindreds.node.human.survival.twilight_vi: The Dúnedain draw strength at the turning of day and night.
kindreds.node.human.survival.grey_compan: The Rangers ride hardest in the grey hours before dawn.
kindreds.node.human.survival.dunadan_end: The blood of Númenor grants long life and slow-failing strength.
kindreds.node.human.survival.star_of_the: The silver star of the Rangers, worn by the heirs of Isildur.
The Dúnedain live thrice the span of lesser Men.
kindreds.node.human.survival.hardy.name: Hardy
kindreds.node.human.survival.hardy.flavo: Years in the wild make a Ranger tough as old leather.
kindreds.node.human.survival.numenorean_: The high blood of the West runs strong and hard to kill.
kindreds.node.human.survival.blood_of_th: The purest Númenórean line — mighty, enduring, hard to fell.
kindreds.node.human.survival.chieftain_o: Wilderness, twilight vigor, and the endurance of the West in one Ranger-lord.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.brute.name: Brute
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.brute.flavor: The Uruk-hai are bred bigger and stronger than any orc.
A fighting Uruk can break a man in two.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.cleaver.name: Cleaver
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.cleaver.flavor: The heavy scimitar of Isengard hews through shield and bone.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.savage_swing.f: A sweeping blow scatters everything within reach.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.black_uruk.fla: The great black Uruks of Barad-dûr, tallest and most terrible.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.bloodlust.flav: An Uruk feeds on the fallen and rises the stronger.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.feed_on_the_fa: 'Looks like meat's back on the menu, boys!'
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.unquenchable.f: No wound and no hunger can stop an Uruk in the frenzy.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.tireless.name: Tireless
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.tireless.flavo: The Uruk-hai march day and night and do not tire.
The Uruk-hai hunt down the fleeing and the weak.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.relentless_pur: Under the sun, at speed, an Uruk in pursuit is death itself.
kindreds.node.uruk.combat.champion_of_is: The mightiest of Saruman's fighting Uruk-hai.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.taskmaster: An Uruk fights harder with the horde howling at his back.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.uruk_capta: The under-captains of Isengard drive the rank and file.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.strength_i: Where orcs swarm, each grows bolder and more deadly.
A great host of Uruks is a tide that drowns all before it.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.horde_mast: The bigger the horde, the more terrible its master.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.driver.fla: Lash and threat drive the host to a punishing pace.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.banner_of_: Beneath the White Hand the Uruks know neither doubt nor mercy.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.saruman_of: The cunning of the fallen wizard bends his host to one will.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.cruel_mast: Cruelty spurs the orc-kind where courage would fail them.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.dread_of_t: The terror of Isengard saps the strength of any who face it.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.terror_inc: To face the White Hand's warlord is to feel one's strength fail.
kindreds.node.uruk.leadership.master_of_: The horde, the White Hand, and the fear of Isengard in one warlord.
The forges of Isengard care nothing for beauty, only for war.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.iron_of_isen: Saruman tore down the trees to feed the fires of war.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.uruk_plate.f: Thick, heavy plate that lesser orcs could not even bear.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.jagged_plate: Spiked and barbed — to strike an Uruk is to be cut in turn.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.heavy_harnes: War-harness so heavy it cannot be knocked aside.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.armour_of_th: The black plate of Saruman's chosen, marked with the White Hand.
A heavy, ugly scimitar — but it hews well enough.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.serrated_edg: A saw-toothed edge that saps the strength from a wound.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.cleaving_axe: A great axe that hews and staggers with every blow.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.weapon_of_th: The savage arms of Saruman's chosen killers.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.forge_temper: Hardened in the furnaces of Orthanc, they do not fear the flame.
Saruman made of Isengard one great engine of war.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.unfeeling.fl: An Uruk feels little, and marches on where others would fall.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.engine_of_is: A living engine of Saruman's war, hard to break and slow to stop.
kindreds.node.uruk.smithing.forge_master: Plate, savage steel, and the fires of Orthanc in one war-smith.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.no_fear.name: No Fear
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.no_fear.flavor: The Uruk-hai were made to know no fear, even unto death.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.barbed_strikes: Filthy, barbed blades leave festering wounds.
The black venom of the Enemy eats at flesh and will alike.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.cruel_wounds.f: Wounds that sap the strength and will to fight.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.venom_of_mordo: The foulest poisons of the Dark Land, worked into every edge.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.dread.name: Dread
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.dread.flavor: An Uruk in its rage looses a wave of terror that unmans the foe.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.fearmonger.fla: The servants of the Enemy feed on the fear they sow.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.terror_of_the_: To fight this Uruk is to feel one's limbs turn slow and cold.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.nameless_dread: A dread out of the old dark that no courage wholly withstands.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.savage.name: Savage
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.savage.flavor: A wounded Uruk fights with the fury of a cornered beast.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.berserker.name: Berserker
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.berserker.flav: Pain only stokes the killing-rage of an Uruk.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.unbroken.name: Unbroken
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.unbroken.flavo: Near death, an Uruk simply refuses to fall.
All thought burned away, only the will to kill remains.
kindreds.node.uruk.shadow.servant_of_the: Cruelty, terror, and unbreaking fury — a true creature of the Shadow.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.warg_rider: The Uruk-hai of Isengard rode great wolves to war.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.wolf_of_is: The wargs know their master and do not turn on him.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.swift_warg: A warg runs down horse and man alike.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.savage_mou: A warg is no tame beast — it fights as fiercely as its rider.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.barded_war: War-wargs of Isengard, armoured and unafraid.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.dread_warg: A monstrous warg of the old breed, terror of the plains.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.call_the_p: A howl in the dark, and the wargs come loping to the hunt.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.pack_leade: Wargs at your command fight with the fury of the pack.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.the_warg_p: A full pack of wargs answers the call, savage and swift.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.warg_maste: The great packs of the Misty Mountains own you their lord.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.houndmaste: The wargs run at your heel and heed your every word.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.mounted_sa: From the back of a warg, an Uruk is death on four swift legs.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.terror_of_: A rider and his pack strike terror across the wild lands.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.lord_of_wa: No warg dares defy you, and the pack fights to the death at your word.
kindreds.node.uruk.beast_lore.warg_lord_: Mount, pack, and savagery — the master of Isengard's wolf-riders.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.savage_swing.fl: A wild sweep scatters everything within reach.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.blackblade.name: Black-blade
kindreds.node.orc.combat.blackblade.flav: A poisoned, jagged blade that leaves the foe weak and reeling.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.blood_frenzy.fl: In the killing-madness an orc feels neither wound nor fear.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.skulker.name: Skulker
kindreds.node.orc.combat.skulker.flavor: Orcs love to strike from behind, out of the dark.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.dark_strength.f: Out of the sun's hate, in the dark, an orc comes into its strength.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.night_raider.fl: Orc raids come in the black hours, swift and unseen.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.terror_in_the_d: In lightless places, this orc is a death that strikes unseen.
kindreds.node.orc.combat.champion_of_the: Blade, horde, and the strength of darkness in one dread orc.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.child_of_the_da: Orcs were made in mockery, and the dark is their home.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.shadow_born.fla: In the deep dark an orc is at ease where others despair.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.one_with_the_da: Orcs move quick and sure where no light reaches.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.unseen_in_the_d: In shadow, a skulking orc all but vanishes.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.strength_of_the: The deeper the dark, the stronger the servant of the Shadow.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.creature_of_nig: A thing of the lightless places, deadly and unseen.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.foul_blades.fla: Orc-blades are smeared with filth that festers in a wound.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.morgul_wound.fl: A wound that will not close, eating at flesh and spirit.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.breath_of_the_n: The dread of the Ringwraiths clings to every stroke.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.fear_the_eye.fl: Terror of the Lidless Eye drives an orc to madness in battle.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.saurons_will.fl: The will of the Dark Lord will not let his slave fall easily.
Hatred keeps an orc fighting long past the point of death.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.slave_of_the_da: Bound to Sauron's will, this orc simply will not stop.
kindreds.node.orc.shadow.shadow_of_mordo: Darkness, the Black Breath, and unseen malice in one creature of the Eye.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.orc_hide.name: Orc-hide
kindreds.node.orc.survival.orc_hide.flav: Tough, filthy hide that shrugs off what would fell a man.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.skulking_surv: Orcs live by cunning and cowardice where the bold would die.
Orcs scuttle up sheer rock like spiders in the deep mines.
At home in the deep dark, an orc moves quick and sure.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.cave_orc.name: Cave-orc
kindreds.node.orc.survival.cave_orc.flav: The pale orcs of the deep places, bred far from any sun.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.thing_from_th: Something that crawled up from the roots of the mountains.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.nimble.name: Nimble
kindreds.node.orc.survival.nimble.flavor: An orc is quick to duck a blow and quicker to flee.
Cowardice keeps an orc alive where courage gets a man killed.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.slippery.name: Slippery
kindreds.node.orc.survival.slippery.flav: Hard to hit and harder to catch in the dark.
This orc slips every blow and every snare, and is gone.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.plague_ridden: Filth and sickness that would kill a man barely slow an orc.
Like all vermin, orcs are wretchedly hard to be rid of.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.unkillable_pe: Stamp on one and two more crawl out of the dark.
kindreds.node.orc.survival.survivor_of_t: Bred in the breeding-pits, this orc is near impossible to kill.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.wolf_friend: Orcs and the wild wolves of the mountains are old allies.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.pack_runner: An orc runs with the wolf-pack, tireless through the night.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.call_wolves: A howl in the dark, and grey shapes come loping to the kill.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.pack_bond.f: The wolves that run with you fight the fiercer for it.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.wolf_lord.f: The great grey packs of the mountains own you their master.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.houndmaster: The pack heeds your every snarl and gesture.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.alpha.name: Alpha
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.alpha.flavo: You are the alpha; the pack kills at your word.
No wolf dares defy you, and the pack fights to the last.
A warg runs down anything that flees before it.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.savage_ride: Rider and beast are one savage killer.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.dread_rider: A monstrous warg and its orc, terror of the wild ways.
kindreds.node.orc.beast_lore.master_of_t: Pack, hound, and warg — all the wild things of the dark are yours.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.slave_drive: Orc captains rule by the lash and the fear it brings.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.orc_captain: A big orc with a loud voice can bully a mob into a army.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.strength_in: A lone orc flees; a swarm of them fears nothing.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.the_mob.fla: A screaming orc-mob is a weapon in itself.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.gorgoroth_h: The countless legions mustered on the plains of the black land.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.endless_hor: For every orc that falls, ten more crawl from the pits.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.the_whip.fl: Lash and curse drive the host to a killing pace.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.cruel_capta: Cruelty holds an orc-band together where loyalty never could.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.mordor_bann: The Red Eye on black cows the host into obedience.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.captain_of_: A captain of Barad-dûr or Cirith Ungol, feared by his own.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.bully.name: Bully
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.bully.flavo: Orcs obey the one who beats them hardest.
The driver feeds on the toil and death of those beneath him.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.dread_capta: His very presence saps the strength of any who oppose him.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.terror_of_t: The overseer of the breeding-pits, hated and obeyed.
kindreds.node.orc.leadership.warlord_of_: The horde, the lash, and the fear of Mordor in one orc-lord.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.sneak.name: Sneak
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.sneak.flavor: A snaga lives by never being seen at all.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.skulk.name: Skulk
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.skulk.flavor: At a whisper of danger, a snaga melts into the shadows.
The little orc slips from shadow to shadow, unremarked.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.ghost.name: Ghost
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.ghost.flavor: Quick and quiet as a ghost through the dark halls.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.never_seen.f: This snaga is a rumour, a shadow, never a target.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.backstab.fla: A snaga's favourite blow lands in an unguarded back.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.cheap_shot.f: A dirty stab that leaves the victim weak and reeling.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.assassin.fla: A poisoned shiv slipped between the ribs from the dark.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.throat_cutte: The killer the big orcs send to do their quietest work.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.slippery.fla: Hard to hit and quick to bolt at the first sign of a fight.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.quick_feet.f: A snaga can outrun almost anything that means it harm.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.vanish.name: Vanish
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.vanish.flavo: Between one breath and the next, the snaga is simply gone.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.now_you_dont: Corner a snaga and it slips away before your eyes.
kindreds.node.snaga.stealth.unseen_death: A poisoned knife out of the dark, and gone before the body falls.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.crude_bow.fl: A short, ugly bow of horn and sinew — but it kills.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.poisoned_arr: Snaga smear their arrows with filth and venom.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.barbed_arrow: Hooked heads that sap the strength as they tear.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.filthy_darts: Darts steeped in so much poison a scratch can fell a man.
A dart of the black poison that will not let a wound close.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.keen_shot.fl: Even a runt of an orc can shoot straight enough.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.from_the_sha: A shaft out of the dark, from farther than expected.
The first shot, from hiding, strikes hardest of all.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.deadeye_snag: A little killer who never wastes a poisoned shaft.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.quick_draw.f: Snaga nock and loose in a frantic blur.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.rain_of_dart: A pack of snaga looses a stinging hail of arrows.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.pelt_them.fl: Harry the foe with a ceaseless rain of poisoned shafts.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.stinging_swa: A swarm of darts that leaves the foe poisoned and reeling.
kindreds.node.snaga.archery.deadly_from_: Poison, volley, and a true-flying shaft — death at a distance.
A snaga is bolder in the dark, where the whip cannot find it.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.whipped_cur.f: Driven by fear of its masters, a snaga moves fast when hurt.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.one_with_shad: In the dark the little orc is quick, sure, and cruel.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.shadow_skin.f: Wrapped in darkness, hard to see and hard to hurt.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.dark_venom.fl: In lightless places the snaga's poisons work their worst.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.creature_of_t: A thing bred in the dark, deadliest where no light falls.
A trapped snaga bites, and bites hard.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.nothing_to_lo: A snaga near death fights with a wretched, desperate fury.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.slaves_last_s: Cornered and doomed, the least orc becomes a vicious thing.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.foul_shiv.fla: A rusty, filth-crusted blade that poisons every cut.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.crippling_str: A hamstringing cut that leaves the foe slow and weak.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.festering_wou: A filthy wound that rots and will not close.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.death_of_a_th: A snaga does not kill fast — it kills cruel.
kindreds.node.snaga.shadow.spite_of_the_: All the hatred of a beaten thing, turned deadly in the dark.
